queries.query: per-layer Lyapunov function LLM fine-tuning adaptive step size rollback 2025 2026

results.title: Fine Tuning LLMs in 2025 — Dextra Labs Guide
results.snippet: Practitioner guide to fine-tuning LLMs in 2025; PEFT/LoRA/QLoRA mainstream techniques; no Lyapunov certificates.

results.title: Fine-tuning LLMs in 2026 — SuperAnnotate
results.snippet: Best practices: data preparation, instruction-tuning, QLoRA cost-efficiency; no per-layer Lyapunov.

results.title: Don't Overthink It: Inter-Rollout Action Agreement (arXiv 2604.08369)
results.snippet: Inter-rollout action agreement as adaptive-compute signal; concerns LLM agents, not Lyapunov fine-tuning.

results.title: Splitwise: Collaborative Edge-Cloud Inference via Lyapunov-Assisted DRL (2025)
results.snippet: Lyapunov-assisted DRL for edge-cloud inference scheduling. Lyapunov used as queue-stability tool, not training certificate.

queries.query: Lyapunov candidate function adaptive learning rate deep neural network layer-wise 2025

results.title: Adaptive Model Learning of Neural Networks with UUB Stability (arXiv 2210.15055)
results.snippet: Uses Lyapunov candidates as energy surface for convex optimization; UUB stability for robot dynamic estimation. Per-layer LLM training not addressed.

results.title: Computing Lyapunov Functions Using Deep Neural Networks (arXiv 2005.08965)
results.snippet: DeepLyapunov: neural nets approximate Lyapunov functions via PDE inequality. Targets control, not fine-tuning gate.

results.title: Analytical Lyapunov Function Discovery: RL-based Generative Approach (2025)
results.snippet: Transformer-based generator+falsifier discovers analytical Lyapunov functions. Source-side, not fine-tuning step-size adaptation.

results.title: Utilizing Lyapunov Exponents in designing deep neural networks (arXiv 2410.05988)
results.snippet: Lyapunov exponents (not Lyapunov certificates) used for activation design; learning rate variations cause chaotic weight changes.

results.title: Layer-wise Adaptive Step-Sizes for Deep Learning (arXiv 2305.13664)
results.snippet: Per-layer step-size adaptive procedure using diagonal Hessian blocks; functionally similar adaptive control but uses curvature not Lyapunov certificate.

results.title: Learning Lyapunov Functions for Piecewise Affine Systems (arXiv 2008.06546)
results.snippet: Learner+verifier for Lyapunov candidates over piecewise affine control. Different domain.
